mapper.select: SELECT id, name, parent_id AS parentId, created_by AS createdBy, created_at AS createdAt FROM file_share_folders ORDER BY parent_id NULLS FIRST, name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO file_share_folders (name, parent_id, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{parentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createdBy}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE file_share_folders SET name = #{name} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT ON (group_id) id, folder_id AS folderId, group_id AS groupId, version, display_name AS displayName, original_name AS originalName, file_path AS filePath, file_size AS fileSize, uploaded_by AS uploadedBy, uploaded_at AS uploadedAt FROM file_share_files WHERE folder_id = #{folderId} ORDER BY group_id, version DESC

SELECT id, folder_id AS folderId, group_id AS groupId, version, display_name AS displayName, original_name AS originalName, file_path AS filePath, file_size AS fileSize, uploaded_by AS uploadedBy, uploaded_at AS uploadedAt FROM file_share_files WHERE group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY version DESC

SELECT id, folder_id AS folderId, group_id AS groupId, version, display_name AS displayName, original_name AS originalName, file_path AS filePath, file_size AS fileSize, uploaded_by AS uploadedBy, uploaded_at AS uploadedAt FROM file_share_files WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO file_share_files (folder_id, group_id, version, display_name, original_name, file_path, file_size, uploaded_by, uploaded_at) VALUES (#{folderId}, #{groupId}, #{version}, #{displayName}, #{originalName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{uploadedBy}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE file_share_files SET group_id = #{groupId} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE file_share_files SET file_path = #{filePath} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(version), 0) + 1 FROM file_share_files WHERE group_id = #{groupId}
